description: You are analyzing order profitability. A standard linear plot hides patterns in small orders because large values stretch the axis. Create a scatter plot visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. Configure the chart with 'Sales' on the X-Axis, 'Profit' on the Y-Axis, and 'Product Category' for Color. Apply a logarithmic scale to the X-Axis (Sales) to handle the skewed data. Set the visualization title to 'Log-Scale Profit Distribution' and save the workbook as 'Distribution_Analysis'.
